# Buzzer moderation wordlist
#
# One word or short phrase per line, case-insensitive. Comments (`#`) and
# blank lines are ignored. Matches are word-boundary based — "class" does
# NOT flag "classic". The check is run over new issue bodies and comments
# from non-collaborators only; maintainers can override with the "safe"
# label on the parent issue if a false positive slips through.
#
# The intent is minimal: block clear-cut profanity + slurs that don't
# belong on a study-focused project. Not a substitute for community
# guidelines — see CONTRIBUTING.md when it exists.
#
# ---- profanity ----
fuck
shit
bitch
asshole
bastard
crap
damn
dick
piss
cunt
prick
whore
slut
# ---- slurs (partial; add locally as needed) ----
# The full list is intentionally not committed publicly — extend on a
# private fork or a protected file if broader coverage is needed.
# ---- spam patterns ----
buy now
click here
free money
crypto giveaway
